zh.of Rhigos, Glynrhondda, Glamorganshire,: 英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根爾格斯
zh.{Blddn ap Mnrch}: 義大利馬阿斯可利 派諾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwilym ap Morgan於大約1535年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根爾格斯時，他的父親Morgan Gwyn60歲，母親Gwerful ferch Madog ap Iorwerth ap Madog60歲。他和Joan ferch Dafydd至少有7個兒子和7個女兒。

zh-hans.of Rhigos, Glynrhondda, Glamorganshire,: 英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根爾格斯
zh-hans.{Blddn ap Mnrch}: 意大利馬阿斯可利 派諾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwilym ap Morgan于大约1535年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根爾格斯时，他的父亲Morgan Gwyn60岁，母亲Gwerful ferch Madog ap Iorwerth ap Madog60岁。他和Joan ferch Dafydd至少有7个儿子和7个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): from the medieval Welsh personal name Morgan, Morgant (Old Welsh Morcant, of uncertain etymology).
Irish: importation of the Welsh surname (see 1 above), to which has been assimilated more than one Gaelic surname, notably Ó Muireagáin (see Merrigan ).
Scottish: probably from a Gaelic personal name cognate with Welsh Morcant.

variants.name: Merrigan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireagáin ‘descendant of Muireagán’ a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’. Compare Morgan , with which this name has been confused.

variants.name: Morgans
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): variant of Morgan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Gwilym
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of William , in use since the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Gwilim
meanings: equivalent of William , in use since the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Gwillym
meanings: equivalent of William , in use since the Middle Ages.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Gwilym ap Morgan was born about 1535, in Rhigos, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Morgan Gwyn, was 60 and his mother, Gwerful ferch Madog ap Iorwerth ap Madog, was 60. He had at least 7 sons and 7 daughters with Joan ferch Dafydd.

fr.of Rhigos, Glynrhondda, Glamorganshire,: Rhigos, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwilym ap Morgan est né environ 1535, à Rhigos, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Morgan Gwyn, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Gwerful ferch Madog ap Iorwerth ap Madog, avait 60 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles avec Joan ferch Dafydd.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwilym ap Morgan um 1535 in Rhigos, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Morgan Gwyn 60 und seine Mutter Gwerful ferch Madog ap Iorwerth ap Madog 60. Er hatte mit Joan ferch Dafydd mindestens 7 Söhne und 7 Töchter.

ht.of Rhigos, Glynrhondda, Glamorganshire,: Rhigos, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwilym ap Morgan è nato il circa 1535 nel Rhigos, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Morgan Gwyn, aveva 60 anni e il suo madre, Gwerful ferch Madog ap Iorwerth ap Madog, aveva 60 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 7 figlie con Joan ferch Dafydd.

ja.{Blddn ap Mnrch}: イタリアマルチェアスコリ ピセノ
ja.lifeSummary: Gwilym ap Morganが約1535年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンルヒゴスで生まれた時，父Morgan Gwynは60歳，母Gwerful ferch Madog ap Iorwerth ap Madogは60歳であった。彼はJoan ferch Dafyddとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwilym ap Morgan(이)가 대략 1535년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 라이고스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Morgan Gwyn(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwerful ferch Madog ap Iorwerth ap Madog(은)는 60세였다. 그는 Joan ferch Dafydd(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwilym ap Morgan nasceu aproximadamente 1535, em Rhigos, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Morgan Gwyn, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Gwerful ferch Madog ap Iorwerth ap Madog, tinha 60 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas com Joan ferch Dafydd.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwilym ap Morgan родился около 1535 г. в местности ригос, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Morgan Gwyn было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwerful ferch Madog ap Iorwerth ap Madog, 60. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей от Joan ferch Dafydd.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwilym ap Morgan nació aproximadamente 1535, en Rhigos, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Morgan Gwyn, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Gwerful ferch Madog ap Iorwerth ap Madog, tenía 60 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 7 hijas con Joan ferch Dafydd.
